mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER) AS total_members, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER WHERE created_at >= #{since}) AS new_members7d, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(view_count), 0) FROM CONTENT) AS total_views, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CONTENT) AS total_contents
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM MEMBER WHERE created_at BETWEEN #{from} AND #{to} GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY date
SELECT c.id AS id, c.title AS title, c.view_count AS view_count, ch.name AS channel_name FROM CONTENT c JOIN CHANNEL ch ON c.channel_id = ch.id ORDER BY c.view_count DESC, c.id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ch.name AS channel_name, COALESCE(SUM(w.watch_seconds), 0) AS total_seconds FROM WATCH_HISTORY w JOIN CONTENT c ON w.content_id = c.id JOIN CHANNEL ch ON c.channel_id = ch.id GROUP BY ch.id, ch.name ORDER BY total_seconds DESC
